frontmatter.title: Brief introduction to Dojo Widgets creation

node.excerpt: In the past, I have been using Dojo Toolkit for relatively little projects. I choose Dojo by its well designed API and its rich and homogeneous set of widgets.jQuery and jQueryUI are great projects, but I found the problem of consistency with jQuery plugins. Each one follow its own rules, each one has its documentation and API, etc.

I'm near to finish my first experience as the author of a technical book. Titled OpenLayers Cookbook it has been written for PacktPublishing editorial, while the OpenLayers version 2.11 was the stable release.

Some days ago I receive an invitation for testing Jelastic
product and, today Saturday, I had a while, made my homework and had my first contact with the platform.

frontmatter.title: Stupid PHP snippet to always download a changing file

node.excerpt: It is short, it is easy, it is stupid but... can save you time. If you need to download every few minutes a remote file that changes its contents at regular intervals of time this is for you.

frontmatter.title: The dojox.grid widgets family and the strange case of the items modification

node.excerpt: So, you are building a web application and decided to use the great Dojo framework.  Probably, if you need to use grids, you will decide to use some of the available widgets subclass of dojox.grid. Well, my friend, be aware with the data you use to fill the grid's store !!! function(DataGrid, ItemFileWriteStore){ });
